productDisplayName: Puma Men's Winglet Grey Navy Flip Flop
description: Look good and stay comfortable all summer in these puma thongs this summer. Team it up with cargo shorts for a day on the beach or for lounging by the pool side. Upper Double panel synthetic thong straps with cat logo Stitched toe seperaters Midsole Foam foot bed for all day comfort Cat logo on footbed Outsole TPR outsole with elevated triangular tread pattern for superior grip and durability Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
